title: solanum nigrum var. crenatodentatum
intro: Solanum nigrum var. crenatodentatum, commonly known as the black nightshade or dark nightshade, is a variety of the Solanum nigrum plant species, which is a type of flowering plant in the nightshade family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include the ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat infections, as well as support immune function and overall well-being. Solanum nigrum var. crenatodentatum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, with some herbal preparations also using the plant's leaves and stems in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
